_doc: Canonical universe — every ticker the demo dataset supports is tier-1 `auto_analysis`. Aligned to the demo provider's `list_tickers()` output so the screener, the memo path, and the long-term memory directory all cover the same set of names. Data-only tier still exists in the schema as runtime state for any ticker the on-demand UI eventually pulls in from outside this list, but the demo seeder no longer leaves any seeded ticker stuck on data_only.
